title: Bhuna Chicken with Grapefizz Glaze
description: A sweet and spicy dish combining the flavors of India and a twist of Western sweetness. Perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high.
Add chicken and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add onion and ginger to skillet and cook until softened, about 3 minutes.
Add bhuna curry paste and cook, stirring constantly, for 1 minute.
Add grapefizz and brown sugar to skillet and bring to a simmer.
Return chicken to skillet and cook until coated in glaze, about 2-3 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
Let rest for 5 minutes before serving.
